features.mainTitle: How Do We Ensure Mosque-Worthy Quality?
features.mainSubtitle: A place of worship is not an ordinary space. Every carpet we make is designed, woven and delivered with this awareness.
features.title: Why Asil Halı?
features.subtitle: Leading mosque carpet manufacturer with 50+ years of experience
features.qualityDesc: Every thread, every knot worked with mosque-worthy quality. ISO-certified production processes.
features.customSizeDesc: Production exactly matching the mosque's square footage. Perfect fit from between columns to the mihrab.
features.customDesignDesc: Traditional Islamic motifs or modern geometric patterns. Custom designs tailored to your mosque's architecture.
features.deliveryDesc: Door-to-door delivery to all 81 provinces. Special logistics and installation for large mosques.
features.experienceDesc: Asil Halı is one of Turkey's established mosque carpet manufacturers with over 50 years of experience.
features.afterSalesDesc: Warranty coverage, maintenance tips and repair service for a long-term customer relationship.
features.referencesDesc: Proven quality installed in tens of thousands of mosques across Turkey.
features.fastProductionDesc: Fast and transparent process tracking from order to delivery. Priority production for urgent projects.
